news.title:
PMLA court issues notices to Nirav Modi's brothers, associates over PNB fraud.
ED seeks to declare them fugitive economic offenders, confiscating assets in Rs 13,850 cr case.
news.summary:
PMLA court issues notices to Nirav Modi's brothers, associates over PNB fraud.
ED seeks to declare them fugitive economic offenders, confiscating assets in Rs 13,850 cr case.

news.title:
Bank of India and PNB plan infra bonds after robust demand for BoB's 100B rupee issue.
PNB may raise 20-50B rupees; BoI up to 100B. Strong investor interest seen.
news.summary:
Bank of India and PNB plan infra bonds after robust demand for BoB's 100B rupee issue.
PNB may raise 20-50B rupees; BoI up to 100B. Strong investor interest seen.

news.title:
₹6,000 Cr frauds in IDFC First Bank, PNB, SBI raise concerns over governance and risk controls.
IDFC faces Rs 590 Cr fraud; PNB reports Rs 2,434 Cr loss; SBI flags RCom's Rs 700 Cr diversion.
news.summary:
₹6,000 Cr frauds in IDFC First Bank, PNB, SBI raise concerns over governance and risk controls.
IDFC faces Rs 590 Cr fraud; PNB reports Rs 2,434 Cr loss; SBI flags RCom's Rs 700 Cr diversion.

news.title:
Fitch affirms PNB's BBB rating with a stable outlook.
PNB's viability rating upgraded to BB by Fitch.
news.summary:
Fitch affirms PNB's BBB rating with a stable outlook.
PNB's viability rating upgraded to BB by Fitch.

news.title:
Punjab National Bank participated in Goldman Sachs 2026 Asia Financials Corporate Day.
Only publicly available information was shared during the virtual meeting on Feb 23, 2026.
news.summary:
Punjab National Bank participated in Goldman Sachs 2026 Asia Financials Corporate Day.
Only publicly available information was shared during the virtual meeting on Feb 23, 2026.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
ED to file chargesheet against Rohan Choksi in PNB fraud case.
Rohan is the son of fugitive diamond trader Mehul Choksi.
news.summary:
ED to file chargesheet against Rohan Choksi in PNB fraud case.
Rohan is the son of fugitive diamond trader Mehul Choksi.

news.title:
ED names Nehal Modi as a co-conspirator in PNB's ₹6,498 crore loan fraud.
Application filed to declare Nehal Modi a Fugitive Economic Offender (FEO).
news.summary:
ED names Nehal Modi as a co-conspirator in PNB's ₹6,498 crore loan fraud.
Application filed to declare Nehal Modi a Fugitive Economic Offender (FEO).

news.title:
Foreign investors are increasing stakes in Indian state-run banks like SBI, Bank of Baroda, Canara Bank, and PNB.
These banks attract inflows due to better valuations and strong growth prospects, bucking the broader equity pullback.
news.summary:
Foreign investors are increasing stakes in Indian state-run banks like SBI, Bank of Baroda, Canara Bank, and PNB.
These banks attract inflows due to better valuations and strong growth prospects, bucking the broader equity pullback.

news.title:
PNB shares rise over 3% as PSU Banks gain for the third session.
Midcap index up 302 pts to 60,183; Nifty Bank rises 377 pts to 61,551.
news.summary:
PNB shares rise over 3% as PSU Banks gain for the third session.
Midcap index up 302 pts to 60,183; Nifty Bank rises 377 pts to 61,551.

news.title:
Punjab National Bank confirmed timely interest payment of Rs. 216.5 Cr for Long Term Bond Series III.
Actual payment date was 16.02.2026 due to bank holidays on 14.02.2026 and 15.02.2026.
news.summary:
Punjab National Bank confirmed timely interest payment of Rs. 216.5 Cr for Long Term Bond Series III.
Actual payment date was 16.02.2026 due to bank holidays on 14.02.2026 and 15.02.2026.

news.title:
Amit Shah to launch India's first CBDC-based PDS in Gujarat.
The system enables subsidy transfers via RBI-authorized CBDC platform.
news.summary:
Amit Shah to launch India's first CBDC-based PDS in Gujarat.
The system enables subsidy transfers via RBI-authorized CBDC platform.

news.title:
ED seeks to declare Nirav Modi's brothers Fugitive Economic Offenders in PNB scam.
Nehal Modi and Neeshal Modi allegedly aided fraudulent activities; PNB lost over Rs 23,780 crore.
news.summary:
ED seeks to declare Nirav Modi's brothers Fugitive Economic Offenders in PNB scam.
Nehal Modi and Neeshal Modi allegedly aided fraudulent activities; PNB lost over Rs 23,780 crore.

news.title:
Bank Nifty fell below 60,000 post RBI's unchanged repo rate at 5.25%. IndusInd, PNB led losses.
Axis, ICICI, and Kotak Bank gained; key support for Bank Nifty is 59,800 with resistance at 60,300-60,400.
news.summary:
Bank Nifty fell below 60,000 post RBI's unchanged repo rate at 5.25%. IndusInd, PNB led losses.
Axis, ICICI, and Kotak Bank gained; key support for Bank Nifty is 59,800 with resistance at 60,300-60,400.

news.title:
CBI files case against a private firm and directors for a ₹10.1 crore fraud.
The alleged fraud was committed against Punjab National Bank (PNB).
news.summary:
CBI files case against a private firm and directors for a ₹10.1 crore fraud.
The alleged fraud was committed against Punjab National Bank (PNB).

news.title:
Punjab National Bank's valuation shifts to 'very attractive' amid market volatility.
Its P/E and P/BV ratios signal potential opportunities compared to historical levels and peers.
news.summary:
Punjab National Bank's valuation shifts to 'very attractive' amid market volatility.
Its P/E and P/BV ratios signal potential opportunities compared to historical levels and peers.

news.title:
PSU bank stocks like SBI, PNB, and Bank of Maharashtra may gain focus as FM Sitharaman proposes the Banking Governance Bill in Budget 2026.
The bill aims to professionalize PSU banks, address talent gaps, and potentially raise FDI limit from 20%, signaling major banking reforms.
news.summary:
PSU bank stocks like SBI, PNB, and Bank of Maharashtra may gain focus as FM Sitharaman proposes the Banking Governance Bill in Budget 2026.
The bill aims to professionalize PSU banks, address talent gaps, and potentially raise FDI limit from 20%, signaling major banking reforms.

news.title:
Punjab National Bank announces senior management changes under SEBI Regulation 30.
Shri Sunil Agrawal retires; Shri Mrityunjay becomes CGM, Zonal Office Lucknow.
news.summary:
Punjab National Bank announces senior management changes under SEBI Regulation 30.
Shri Sunil Agrawal retires; Shri Mrityunjay becomes CGM, Zonal Office Lucknow.

news.title:
ED restores assets worth ₹2.5Cr to PNB under PMLA provisions.
The restored assets include five immovable properties in a money laundering case.
news.summary:
ED restores assets worth ₹2.5Cr to PNB under PMLA provisions.
The restored assets include five immovable properties in a money laundering case.

news.title:
Punjab National Bank's Q3 FY26 net profit rose 13.1% YoY to INR 5,100 crore, with global business growing 9.5% YoY to INR 28.92 trillion.
Asset quality improved with GNPA down to 3.19% and NNPA at 0.32%. CASA ratio stood steady at 37.1%, supported by digital initiatives and branch expansions.
news.summary:
Punjab National Bank's Q3 FY26 net profit rose 13.1% YoY to INR 5,100 crore, with global business growing 9.5% YoY to INR 28.92 trillion.
Asset quality improved with GNPA down to 3.19% and NNPA at 0.32%. CASA ratio stood steady at 37.1%, supported by digital initiatives and branch expansions.
